subject: [RFC PATCH v4 05/27] mm: introduce folio_is_private_managed() unified predicate

reviews.author: Gregory Price
reviews.summary: No review comments have been made on this patch yet.

2026-02-22.patch_summary: This RFC patch introduces a unified predicate `folio_is_private_managed()` to simplify code and improve consistency across multiple mm subsystems. The new function returns true for folios on N_MEMORY_PRIVATE nodes or in ZONE_DEVICE, replacing the existing `folio_is_zone_device` function at certain skip sites.
